attributes.name: commit_message
attributes.value:
test(test_check_command): add blank line after subject for `COMMIT_LOG`

According to the spec of conventional commits, the body must begin with a blank line after the description.

spec: https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/#specification

attributes.name: commit_message
attributes.value:
feat: Add option in bump command to redirect git output to stderr

This is useful used in conjunction with `--changelog-to-stdout` if you
don't need/want the resulting output to contain the `git commit` log
messages.
